---
title: "First Meeting Record"
---

## Meeting Description

Date / Time: 12 March 2026 (11.30pm) - 13 March 2026 (12am)

Location: Online Meeting

Attendees: Xi Zixun, Wang Zhuoran, Jin Qinhao

## Meeting Notes

-   Decided on Research / Analysis Topic Related To Singapore Tourism. Selected Dataset related to Singapore Tourism Recovery from (CEIC)\[(https://insights-ceicdata-com.libproxy.smu.edu.sg/)\]

-   Distribution of early work across exploratory analysis, modelling, and clustering.

### ACTION ITEMS (Owner and deadline)

-   Exploratory analysis - Xi Zixun (Sunday, 15 March 2026)

-   Initial modelling prototype - Jin Qinhao (Sunday, 15 March 2026)

-   Cluster analysis - Wang Zhuoran (Sunday, 15 March 2026)
